vocab.meaning: những thứ cực kỳ cơ bản và tối yếu
vocab.example: I’m not one for bulky bags, so I usually just head out with the bare essentials like my keys and wallet.

vocab.meaning: chiếc điện thoại thông minh luôn hiện diện (vật bất ly thân)
vocab.example: In this digital age, the ubiquitous smartphone has replaced the need to carry a physical map or a heavy camera.

vocab.meaning: nguồn điện dự phòng (sạc dự phòng)
vocab.example: Since I rely heavily on my phone for navigation, carrying a backup power source is a non-negotiable for me.
I’ve ditched the traditional bulky wallet in favor of a sleek cardholder to keep my pocket profile slim.

vocab.meaning: đồ dùng cá nhân (thường dùng trong ngữ cảnh trang trọng hoặc hành lý)
vocab.example: I always do a quick mental check of my personal effects before leaving a cafe to ensure nothing is left behind.

vocab.meaning: có thể mang theo dễ dàng (nhẹ và gọn)
vocab.example: I prefer totable gadgets that don't add unnecessary weight to my everyday carry.

vocab.meaning: những thứ nhu yếu, cần thiết
vocab.example: Depending on the weather, a compact umbrella or a pair of sunglasses are added to my list of necessities.

vocab.meaning: trong tầm tay (nghĩa là luôn mang theo bên người)
vocab.example: I like to keep my lip balm and hand sanitizer within arm's reach in the outer compartment of my bag.
I make a conscious effort to keep my bag clutter-free by removing old receipts at the end of every day.
I carry a small multifunctional tool on my keychain, which has proven useful in countless unexpected situations.
